user_story: As a Manager, I want to select an employee and optionally a project name, so that I can view how that employee is allocated across projects
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Project Allocation screen; When I select an employee name and optionally a project name; Then the query is scoped accordingly

user_story: As a Manager, I want to choose a period with From and To dates via calendar pickers, so that I can limit the allocation view to a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am setting up an allocation query; When I open the calendars and pick From and To dates; Then the period is applied to the results

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search allocations, so that I can review both day-wise and project-wise summaries for the employee
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected employee and period; When I click Search; Then the day wise and project wise summaries are populated

user_story: As a Manager, I want a day-wise summary showing date, project and allocated hours, so that I can track daily effort per project
acceptance_criteria: Given a search has returned results; When I view the day wise summary; Then each row shows date, project and allocated hours

user_story: As a Manager, I want a project-wise summary showing S.no, project and allocated hours, so that I can see total effort by project for the employee
acceptance_criteria: Given a search has returned results; When I view the project wise summary; Then each row shows S.no, project and allocated hours

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters and refresh the summaries, so that I can clear or reload data easily
acceptance_criteria: Given I have run a query; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then the filters are cleared or the summaries reload with current data
